item.name: Poet's Pipe
item.description:
Warning: not an actual musical instrument. Do not attempt to blow on it.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: A species of saltwater fish that is likened to an ocarina on account of its shape. Legend holds that, enchanted by a siren's song, a bard cast himself into the sea, and from the instrument he was clutching this fish was born.
